case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. TIMOTHY WASHINGTON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, TIMOTHY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,449.50 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, TIMOTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, TIMOTHY $1,449.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
